channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: G7 Finance Ministers Discuss Energy Supply Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: OTTAWA — The G7 finance ministers convened on Monday to discuss potential measures to support global oil supply as prices surged due to escalating tensions in Iran. While no immediate release of emerg...

item.title: World Dog Surf Champion Sugar Battles Cancer at Age 16
item.description: Sugar, the 16-year-old rescue therapy dog and five-time World Dog Surf Champion, is now facing a battle with cancer. Sugar’s owner, Ryan Rustan of Huntington Beach, shared the news on a GoFundMe page,...

item.title: Philippine Statistics Authority Recommends Cancellation of Mining Executive’s Birth Certificate
item.description: The Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA) has recommended the cancellation of the birth certificate of mining executive Joseph Sy after a three-month delay that drew criticism from lawmakers. During a...

item.title: Christopher de Leon Reflects on Portraying Ramon Montenegro in “FPJ’s Batang Quiapo”
item.description: Veteran actor Christopher de Leon shares his experience portraying the character Ramon Montenegro in the hit television series “FPJ’s Batang Quiapo.” In a recent interview, de Leon discussed the depth...

item.title: King Charles leads senior royals at Commonwealth Day service amid discussions on Prince Andrew's succession status
item.description: King Charles III, Queen Camilla, the Prince and Princess of Wales, Princess Anne, and other senior members of the Royal Family attended the annual Commonwealth Day service at Westminster Abbey, markin...

item.title: Bahrain and Gulf Energy Facilities Hit Amid Iran Strikes, Causing Force Majeure Declarations
item.description: On 9th March 2026, Iran carried out a series of attacks on energy facilities across the Gulf region, including Bahrain’s Al Ma’ameer oil complex. The strike led to a fire and considerable damage, prom...

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei appointed as Iran's Supreme Leader amid escalating Middle East conflict
item.description: Iran don choose Mojtaba Khamenei as the new Supreme Leader, and dis move don make hope of quick ending of the Middle East war very slim. Hardliners show force for Khamenei, wey get strong connection w...

item.title: NRC investigates reported attack on University of Ibadan lecturer at Moniya Station
item.description: The Nigerian Railway Corporation (NRC) don announce say dem go investigate one incident wey involve Dr Mikail Abdussalam, lecturer for University of Ibadan, wey people claim say dem attack am for Obaf...

item.title: Middle East War and Strait of Hormuz Closure Trigger Fuel Price Hike and Economic Risks in Pakistan
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East, now in a gruelling stalemate, has severely affected Pakistan through the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, removing about 20 million barrels per day from global oil ...

item.title: Meaningful Text Messages to Express Love and Longing in Relationships
item.description: This article talks about the importance of sending 'I can't wait to be with you' text messages in romantic relationships. According to relationship coach Bilha Njau, these messages are not just cute—t...

item.title: Residents of Durban's Piedmont Park Face Demolitions Amid Delayed Eviction Proceedings
item.description: Residents of the Piedmont Park informal settlement in Durban are facing repeated shack demolitions even as a legal eviction case drags on. Sofe Zwane, who has lived there for five years with her three...

item.title: B.C. Government to Provide Guidelines for Safe Access Around Schools and Places of Worship
item.description: B.C. Premier David Eby, Attorney General Niki Sharma, and Minister of Education and Child Care Lisa Beare are scheduled to announce new guidelines for safe access to schools and places of worship. The...

item.title: Boko Haram Attack in Borno Kills Senior Nigerian Army Officer and Soldiers
item.description: Na fresh wahala don happen for Borno State as Boko Haram don attack military base for Kukawa town. The insurgents carry out coordinated assault, commot soldiers from the base, burn vehicles, and carry...

item.title: DTB Recognises Contributions of Female Employees on International Women’s Day
item.description: Diamond Trust Bank Tanzania (DTB) celebrated International Women’s Day 2026 by recognising the dedication and hard work of its female staff. The bank, under the theme “Give to Gain,” presented special...

item.title: Kawangware Bus Crash on Valley Road Leaves One Dead and Several Injured
item.description: On Monday morning, Nairobi experienced another tragic road accident when a City Shuttle bus lost control on the hilly stretch of Valley Road near Panafric Hotel. The bus collided with multiple vehicle...

item.title: Army and MILF peacekeepers secure Cotabato towns after Moro group clashes
item.description: COTABATO CITY — A coordinated peacekeeping effort has successfully calmed tensions between two armed Moro factions that recently clashed along the border of Nabalawag and Midsayap towns in Cotabato pr...

item.title: Iran Appoints Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader Amid Ongoing US-Israel Conflict on Day 10
item.description: On the tenth day of the ongoing war between Iran and the US-Israel coalition, a major political shift occurred when Iran's Assembly of Experts appointed Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as the new Supreme L...

item.title: What the U.S. Government’s UFO and Alien Files Are Likely to Reveal
item.description: The U.S. government is preparing to release files on unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP), UFOs, and extraterrestrial life, following an announcement by former President Donald Trump. While the release...

item.title: Judiciary Expands with New Court of Appeal and Small Claims Court Stations Across Kenya
item.description: Chief Justice Martha Koome has officially gazetted new Court of Appeal stations at Kakamega and Nkubu Law Courts, bringing the total number of appellate stations in Kenya to eight. A sub-registry has ...

item.title: Harmonize settles divorce with ex-wife Sarah Michelotti for Sh7.5m
item.description: Tanzanian Bongo flava star Harmonize, whose real name is Rajab Abdul Kahali, has reached an out-of-court divorce settlement with his Italian ex-wife, Sarah Michelotti, bringing to a close a long‑runni...
